title: Eirio and Ai trading
author: RichSun5098
selftext:
Hey guys, been trying this app Eirio for quite a few time now, i'm not gonna to y'all I didn't trust it at least but after the first withdrawal I had to believe in it

Ofc nobody is gonna get rich from it, I withdrew just 150 dollars from it in about a month, I mean its not bad considering that it was just free money

The only problem is that to enter you need a code, it was very hard to get it so I'm gonna give mine here:  VKNPPE

If you any question on how it works, you can contact me :)
